titleStmt.title: SII 23.382: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 382. (A.R. No. 382 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 33: 1211 A.D.

summary.p: The king is here called Tribhuvanavīradēva ‘who performed the anointment of heroes and victors after having taken Madurai, Īḻam, Karuvūr and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya.’ The details of the date given viz., Rishabha, ba. 10, Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi would give the equivalent A.D. 1211, May 6. This registers a gift of a quarter (vēli) of land belonging to the sabhā of Nallūr-Pudukkuḍi, to the temple of Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār as tirunāmattukkāṇi and ūrkīḻ-iṟaiyili after relieving it from the previous holder.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—...svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccak
karavarttikaḷ marutaiyum Īḻa
muṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭit
talaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi virar Abhiṣeka
mum vijaiyar Abhiṣekamum
paṇṇi Aruḷiya tiripuvaṉavirate
varkku yāṇṭu [3 10 3] Iṣabhanāyaṟṟu A
parabhakṣattu dacamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭātināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭace
mahāsabhaiyom I
kkulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu
Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyārkku tirunāmattuk
kāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyumāka nāṅkaḷ
Iṉṉāyaṉār Āticaṇṭecuratevar tiru
kku [rājarāja] vāykkālukkut teṟku
mutaṟcaturattukku
kiḻpāṟkellai vatikku meṟkkum
teṉpāṟkellai nalluḻāṉ
yattu nilattukku vaṭakkum
kallai kācipaṉ tillaināyaka
kūttaṉum tiruve kavuṇi
yaṉ centāmaraik kaṇṇaṉum tomat
tiyaṉ Āṉantakkūttaṉ poṉṉārmeṉi
yaṉum nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkel
lai [rājarāja]vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka Icai
nta Iṉṉāṉkellaiuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa sabhai
p potu pottakappaṭi nilam muṉṟu
māmukkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiyil
vari viniyoka Iṉṉilam
muṭaiyāṉai māṟi Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tiru
nāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭut
tom Iṉṉilattu meṉokkiya maramum kiḻno
kkiya kiṇaṟum Uḷpaṭa cantirātittavarai tirunā
mattukkāṇiyākavum Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uḷpaṭa
Iṟaiyiliyākavum kuṭuttom Iṉṉilaṅkā
lum tirunāmattukkāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumāka kal
lillum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum
Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭut
tom Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyyār Uṭaiyār koyil Ātica
ṇṭecuratevarkku nallūr putukkuṭi makāsabhaiyo
Ūrkaṇakku putukkuṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṇa nampiye
Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭikku Ivai pālāciriyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uttamacoḻappirammā
Ippaṭikku Ivai nikarilicoḻap pirammārāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ kāṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Āṉantakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 23.382 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
